es.title: Noticias Diarias: Copyright e Inteligencia Artificial
es.subtitle: Lo último en leyes de derechos de autor para músicos, compositores y productores.

sections.title: La Corte Suprema de los Estados Unidos se pronuncia sobre el caso de derechos de autor de AI
sections.content: En un fallo reciente, la Corte Suprema de los Estados Unidos ha decidido que las obras creadas con la ayuda de inteligencia artificial no son elegibles para la protección de derechos de autor. Esta decisión ha generado un gran debate en la industria musical, ya que muchos artistas y productores han comenzado a utilizar la IA para crear música.

sections.title: La empresa de música Amper Music lanza una plataforma de licencias para obras de AI
sections.content: Amper Music, una empresa que utiliza la inteligencia artificial para crear música, ha lanzado una plataforma de licencias que permite a los productores y artistas utilizar sus obras de AI en proyectos comerciales. Esta plataforma ofrece una solución para los productores que buscan utilizar música de AI de manera legal y segura.

sections.title: Guía del día: Cómo registrar tus obras de AI
sections.content: Para registrar tus obras de AI, es importante que sigas los siguientes pasos: primero, asegúrate de que la obra sea original y no sea una copia de otra obra existente. Luego, debes determinar si la obra es elegible para la protección de derechos de autor. Finalmente, debes registrar la obra en la oficina de derechos de autor correspondiente, como la Oficina de Derechos de Autor de los Estados Unidos.

en.title: Daily News: Copyright & Artificial Intelligence
en.subtitle: The latest in copyright law for musicians, composers, and producers.

sections.title: US Supreme Court Rules on AI Copyright Case
sections.content: In a recent ruling, the US Supreme Court has decided that works created with the help of artificial intelligence are not eligible for copyright protection. This decision has sparked a heated debate in the music industry, as many artists and producers have begun using AI to create music. Companies like Google and Amazon have also been affected, as they have been investing heavily in AI-generated music.

sections.title: Amper Music Launches AI Music Licensing Platform
sections.content: Amper Music, a company that uses artificial intelligence to create music, has launched a licensing platform that allows producers and artists to use their AI-generated works in commercial projects. This platform provides a solution for producers looking to use AI music in a legal and secure way. The platform offers a range of licensing options, including sync licenses and mechanical licenses.

sections.title: Today's Guide: Registering Your AI-Generated Works
sections.content: To register your AI-generated works, follow these steps: first, ensure that the work is original and not a copy of an existing work. Next, determine if the work is eligible for copyright protection. Finally, register the work with the relevant copyright office, such as the US Copyright Office. It's also important to keep records of the creation process, including any human involvement, to support your claim of ownership.
